did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a comprehensive survey (literature review) of existing AI models, datasets, and clinical applications in skin disease diagnosis. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying AI/ML/DL methods to new data; rather, it synthesizes and reviews prior studies that used these methods.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
